summary: A memorable To Lay Me Down breakout makes this show shine, though the recording source and fidelity are unspecified.
review: The crowd went wild for the To Lay Me Down breakout, and many listeners recall it as one of Jerry Garcia’s finest ballad performances alongside Comes A Time. No details about the tape source or sound quality were provided, but the enthusiastic fan rating (4 stars) indicates a generally positive listening experience.

ai_rating.rationale: The single review is strongly positive about the performance (4‑star rating, glowing description of Jerry’s ballad) but gives no information on recording quality, so the overall score reflects a good show with unknown audio fidelity.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not comment on soundboard vs. audience source, clarity, or mix; recording quality cannot be assessed from the available feedback.
